backend/main.mo: Defines the main actor with numerous domain types for patients, lab results, medications, ADRs, narrations, drug interactions, resources, and storage mixins.
backend/migration.mo: Contains migration logic and a predefined authoritative drug dataset used to evolve old actor state into the new format.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting feature-to-file mappings, components used, and confidence levels for project requirements.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Lists summarized descriptions of multiple frontend files, highlighting functionality, optimizations, and UI behavior.
frontend/.env.local: Environment variables for local frontend development including network, canister IDs, and dev server settings.
frontend/index.html: Base HTML file loading the React application entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app component handling authentication flow, profile loading logic, layout rendering, and query client setup.
frontend/src/backend.idl.ts: IDL definitions for backend types and records used to generate the frontend canister interface.
frontend/src/components/AddPatientDialog: Modal form component for adding a patient with validation, BMI calculation, and success/error handling.
frontend/src/components/AdrForm.tsx: Form for submitting an ADR for a patient, including validation, date parsing, and mutation handling.
frontend/src/components/AdrsModule.tsx: Displays a patient’s ADR history and provides a tabbed interface to record new ADRs.
Empty component file with no implemented logic.
frontend/src/components/CaseEntry.tsx: Main case entry interface showing patient info and tabbed forms for labs, medications, ADRs, prescriber details, and summary.
frontend/src/components/CaseNarrationSec: Generates, displays, copies, and saves case narrations using patient data, labs, meds, ADRs, and prescriber details.
frontend/src/components/CaseSummary.tsx: Fetches patient-related data, filters it by patient ID, and renders a detailed clinical case summary with export and loading states.
frontend/src/components/DisclaimersSecti: Displays a static list of application disclaimers with icons in a styled card.
frontend/src/components/DrugBulkImportDi: Handles file selection, parsing, validation, and bulk upload of drug datasets with status feedback and error handling.
frontend/src/components/DrugDetailsModal: Shows detailed drug information in a modal with formatted metadata, safety info, and source labeling.
frontend/src/components/DrugDrugInteract: Provides drug search, selection, manual lookup, and interaction detail viewing using a drug interaction database.
frontend/src/components/DrugInteractions: Checks and displays multi-drug, drug–food, and food–food interactions with severity, evidence, and detailed result cards.
frontend/src/components/DrugMonographSec: Displays pharmacokinetic details of a drug monograph with fallback messaging when data is unavailable.
Provides a full drug table interface with filtering, pagination, verification, and admin tools using backend data hooks.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with branding and an educational-use disclaimer.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Shows the site header with logo, user info, and logout functionality based on authentication state.
frontend/src/components/LabResultsForm.t: Form for entering patient lab results with validation, error handling, and submission to backend.
frontend/src/components/LabResultsModule: Displays patient info, BMI category, a form for lab entry, and a historical list of lab results.
frontend/src/components/LoginScreen.tsx: Login screen using Internet Identity with preloaded assets, error handling, and secure access messaging.
frontend/src/components/MedicationForm.t: Form component for adding a medication with validation, date parsing, and success/error handling.
frontend/src/components/MedicationsModul: Displays patient info and provides tabs to add or view medications filtered by patient.
frontend/src/components/MonthlyBanTrends: Dialog showing yearly banned drug statistics with summary cards and a bar chart.
frontend/src/components/MukabotWidget.ts: Empty component file with no implemented content.
frontend/src/components/NameAutocomplete: Autocomplete input with suggestion filtering, keyboard navigation, and click‑outside handling.
frontend/src/components/PatientDetailsDi: Dialog showing detailed patient info including labs, medications, and ADRs with memoized subcomponents.
frontend/src/components/PatientManagemen: Patient table with view, select, and delete actions plus dialogs for adding and inspecting patients.
frontend/src/components/PreclinicalDataF: Empty component file with no implemented content.
frontend/src/components/PreclinicalDataM: Empty component file with no implemented content.
frontend/src/components/PrescriberDetail: Form component for viewing, editing, validating, and saving prescriber details tied to a patient.
frontend/src/components/PrescriptionUplo: Empty or placeholder file for prescription upload functionality.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal for entering and validating basic user profile details and saving them via an API call.
frontend/src/components/RestrictedDrugsM: Displays categorized restricted drugs with search, collapsible sections, and external resource links.
frontend/src/components/StartupProfileRe: Banner prompting user to retry or log out when profile loading is delayed.
frontend/src/components/WavebotWidget.ts: Interactive chatbot widget integrating patient and lab data with external pharmacovigilance resources.
frontend/src/data/curatedDrugDataset.ts: Utility functions and a large curated dataset of drugs with deduplication logic and metadata.
frontend/src/data/drugFoodInteractionsDa: Defines a detailed drug‑food interaction dataset with structured fields for effects, risks, and management guidance.
frontend/src/data/drugInteractionExample: Provides preset drug interaction example sets and utility functions for loading and validating them.
Contains comprehensive drug monographs with pharmacokinetics, side effects, contraindications, and population guidance.
frontend/src/data/expandedDrugDatasetApp: Stores an extended list of drug entries with status, metadata, and safety info to expand the canonical dataset.
frontend/src/data/foodFoodInteractionsDa: Defines a dataset describing interactions between food pairs, including severity, effects, and recommendations.
frontend/src/data/foodList.ts: Provides the canonical list of foods for lookup and autocomplete plus a helper to return all items.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous backend actor and refreshes dependent queries on change.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks to manage Internet Identity authentication using AuthClient, including login state, stored identity loading, and provider setup.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines numerous React Query hooks for CRUD operations and data fetching across patients, labs, medications, ADRs, interactions, and drug services using an actor backend.
frontend/src/index.css: TailwindCSS base and utility layers defining a clinical-themed design system, dark mode variables, GPU-optimized animations, and layout utilities.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the app by rendering it with ReactDOM and wrapping it in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Implements the main dashboard with tabbed modules, lazy loading, intelligent prefetch, and UI cards for various medical management features.
frontend/src/services/caseNarrationGener: Generates a formatted clinical case narration string from patient, prescriber, lab, medication, and ADR data using helper formatting utilities.
frontend/src/services/cdscoDrugService.t: Simulates CDSCO drug data retrieval with caching and provides sample banned drug records.
Parses and normalizes drug datasets from JSON or CSV, returning structured results with errors and warnings.
frontend/src/services/drugDrugInteractio: Manages drug‑interaction data with caching, default datasets, and interaction details from multiple sources.
frontend/src/services/drugInteractionInd: Builds and caches an O(1) lookup index for drug‑drug interactions using normalized pair keys.
frontend/src/services/drugInteractionVer: Verifies drug‑interaction data via external sources with caching, versioning, and scheduled syncs.
frontend/src/services/drugListVerificati: Validates drug lists for empty names, invalid statuses, and duplicates, producing a pass/fail report.
frontend/src/services/drugMonographServi: Provides normalized lookup and caching for drug monograph data with optional cache invalidation.
frontend/src/services/foodInteractionInd: Builds and caches normalized drug-food and food-food interaction indexes and provides lookup and invalidation utilities.
frontend/src/services/interactionNameCat: Generates canonical drug and food name lists and provides normalization-aware suggestion filtering.
frontend/src/services/localInteractionCh: Computes drug-drug, drug-food, and food-food interactions using cached indexes and maps raw data to typed result objects.
frontend/src/services/multiSourceDrugSer: Aggregates multi-source drug datasets with caching, background syncing, and deterministic merging logic.
frontend/src/utils/dateParsing.ts: Provides utilities to parse, validate, and format dates using nanosecond timestamps.
frontend/src/utils/drugPairs.ts: Handles drug name normalization, generates consistent pair keys, and produces unique drug pairs.
frontend/src/utils/formValidation.ts: Offers shared validation helpers for required fields, emails, phone numbers, numeric inputs, and error extraction.
frontend/src/utils/interactionSummary.ts: Computes overall interaction severity and toxicity summaries and provides formatting helpers.
frontend/src/utils/nameNormalization.ts: Provides functions to normalize names, compare normalized names, and detect duplicates based on case-, space-, and punctuation-insensitive matching.
frontend/src/utils/namePairs.ts: Generates deterministic unique name pairs from 2–4 inputs and formats pair labels for display.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind with custom colors, typography, container settings, and plugins for the project's UI theme.
project_state.json: Stores project metadata, feature requirements, known issues, and planned features for the CDSCO drug database application.
